testcase.failure: Line 1: AWS_ARN detected with 95.0% confidence (HIGH) Match: arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/PaymentsAdmin Validator: cloud_resources Line 2: AWS_ARN detected with 75.0% confidence (MEDIUM) Match: arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/PaymentsAdmin Validator: cloud_resources
